summary: PR #15 iter-3 reviewed in 2 cycles. Cycle 1 (2026-05-15T06:00:00Z): BLOCKED — 6 violations found. Cycle 2 (2026-05-15T07:00:00Z): APPROVED — all 6 violations resolved. Story 3.0 hard gate satisfied (zero google_maps_flutter/geocoding imports). BUG-3-1 resolved (widget test 4/4 pass). dart analyze: 0 errors/0 warnings. flutter test: 47 pass / 1 pre-existing fail (TC-2-28). All 6 blocks fixed: (1) LiveTrackingCubit now uses TrackingRepository domain interface only; (2) live_map_page.dart helpers extracted to live_map_app_bar.dart and live_map_body.dart; (3) sos_banner.dart 3 SnackBar strings use context.l10n; (4) sos_button.dart Semantics label uses context.l10n.tracking_sosSemanticsLabel; (5) route_map_preview.dart error uses context.l10n.map_geocodeError; (6) sos_banner_action.dart extracted from sos_banner.dart; home_garage_card.dart delegates to sibling files. PR ready to merge.

qualityGates.detail: BLOCK-3/4/5 RESOLVED: sos_banner.dart uses context.l10n.tracking_sosCallError/sosLocationError/sosMapError. sos_button.dart uses context.l10n.tracking_sosSemanticsLabel. route_map_preview.dart uses context.l10n.map_geocodeError.

qualityGates.name: one_widget_per_file
qualityGates.detail: BLOCK-6 RESOLVED: sos_banner.dart has only SosBannerWidget (1 class). _SosBannerAction extracted to sos_banner_action.dart. home_garage_card.dart delegates to sibling widget files.
